candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown below, each of the resistors has the same resistance. As shown in the figure, a voltmeter with very high resistance is connected between two points in the circuit. Between which two points of connection would the voltmeter read zero?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
在下面所示的电路中,每个电阻具有相同的电阻值 $R$。一个内阻极高的电压表连接在电路的两个节点之间。电压表在哪两个节点之间的读数为零?

<image 1>

normalized_value.title: SciVerse 开放题
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text: In the circuit shown below, each of the resistors has the same resistance. As shown in the figure, a voltmeter with very high resistance is connected between two points in the circuit. Between which two points of connection would the voltmeter read zero?

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The text clearly asks for a pair of labeled circuit points where a high-resistance voltmeter would read zero, and the diagram is legible enough to see the resistor network and labels W, U, S, Q, T, and P. The image is required and usable. One minor risk is that the open-ended version may permit more than one equipotential pair, even though a specific answer is provided.
